x-enumeration-literals.name: Retail Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents an individual customer availing standard banking products and services for personal use.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mass Market Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents customers with basic financial needs and moderate engagement with standard financial products.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Affluent Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents customers with higher income levels and access to enhanced or premium financial services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: High Net Worth Individual
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents customers with significant financial assets and investment capacity requiring specialized wealth management services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Student Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals primarily engaged in education with limited or no stable income, requiring tailored financial solutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Senior Citizen Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents elderly or retired individuals with specific financial needs such as pension management and low-risk investments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals or entities engaged in commercial or professional activities requiring business-oriented financial services.
